Acceptance Criteria: Sticky header renders on all marketing routes; logo links home; dropdowns keyboard-accessible; theme + Sign in/Get started visible; passes axe a11y.
Description: Sticky top header for public pages: logo, primary nav dropdowns (Product/Solutions/Industries/Resources/Pricing), theme & accessibility menu, Sign in + Get started CTAs.

Acceptance Criteria: Footer present on every page; columns populated from nav model; legal + social links valid; responsive at 360px.
Description: Global footer (Product, Solutions, Industries, Resources, Company, Legal) + newsletter CTA, social, locale, copyright. Replaces hardcoded home footer.

Acceptance Criteria: SiteHeader+SiteFooter wrap all marketing routes; URLs unchanged; build passes.
Description: Add app/(marketing)/layout.tsx wrapping SiteHeader + SiteFooter via route group (no URL changes).

Acceptance Criteria: AppShell wraps all product routes via single group layout; per-section layouts removed.
Description: Add app/(app)/layout.tsx wrapping AppShell for product routes; consolidate per-section AppShell layouts.

Acceptance Criteria: All ~17 previously chrome-less pages now render header+footer; no broken imports; build + typecheck pass.
Description: Move home, solutions/*, industries/*, about, contact, faq, knowledge, studio, pricing, legal under (marketing). Fixes the dead-end pages.

Acceptance Criteria: bots, workspace, marketplace, control-center, scenarios, workflows, categories share AppShell; routes resolve unchanged.
Description: Move product routes under (app) with shared AppShell.

Acceptance Criteria: Home uses SiteHeader/SiteFooter; bespoke Header removed; section anchors become scrollspy sub-nav.
Description: Remove bespoke home Header; reuse SiteHeader. Convert 5 section anchors into a scrollspy sub-nav.

Acceptance Criteria: Topbar logo/theme/CTA styling matches SiteHeader; visual QA approved.
Description: Unify styling between marketing header and app topbar for visual consistency.

Acceptance Criteria: Drawer opens/closes with focus trap; all nav groups reachable; works at 360-768px; ESC closes.
Description: Slimmed responsive drawer reusing FullscreenMenu content for the marketing shell on small screens.

Task: Create typed navigation source of truth
Acceptance Criteria: Single typed nav model exported; header, footer, mobile menu, sitemap all consume it; no duplicated link lists.
Description: New lib/content/navigation.ts consumed by header, footer, mobile menu, sitemap. Replaces sprawling 8-group/46-link site.ts.

Acceptance Criteria: /shop 301-redirects to /marketplace; nav no longer lists Shop; no orphaned links.
Description: Collapse /shop and /marketplace into one catalog with redirect.

Acceptance Criteria: Categories/Scenarios reachable as filters within bots; removed from top-level nav; deep links still resolve.
Description: Treat categories and scenarios as filtered views of bots rather than top-level destinations.

Acceptance Criteria: Top level = Product/Solutions/Industries/Resources/Pricing/Company; Legal in footer; redundant entry points removed.
Description: Establish the canonical top-level taxonomy and remove overlapping entry points.

Acceptance Criteria: All retired/duplicate routes 301 to canonical targets; verified with build output.
Description: Configure redirects for retired/duplicate routes.

Acceptance Criteria: Unknown route shows branded 404 with header/footer, search, and recovery links; no unstyled default.
Description: app/not-found.tsx with brand styling, search, and navigation recovery. Currently falls to unstyled Next default.

Acceptance Criteria: Thrown render error shows branded fallback with retry; logged; no white screen.
Description: Branded error and global-error boundaries with retry.

Acceptance Criteria: Route transitions show skeletons; no layout shift; app routes covered.
Description: app/loading.tsx + per-section skeletons for app routes.

Acceptance Criteria: Sitemap lists static + dynamic routes (bots, knowledge, workflows, scenarios, industries); valid XML.
Description: Generate sitemap from nav model + dynamic routes.

Acceptance Criteria: robots.txt served with sitemap reference and crawl rules.
Description: robots.txt with sitemap reference and crawl rules.

Acceptance Criteria: Shared OG card renders for pages without a custom image; passes social debuggers.
Description: Default Open Graph card for social sharing.

Acceptance Criteria: Marketing pages show breadcrumbs reflecting hierarchy; home excluded.
Description: Add breadcrumbs to marketing pages (currently app-only).

Acceptance Criteria: Studio embeds working AiDemoPanel; misleading LIVE badge removed or made accurate.
Description: Embed real AiDemoPanel on /studio; remove misleading LIVE DEMO badge that links away.

Acceptance Criteria: /(auth)/login renders branded UI; Sign in CTA routes to it; no backend wired yet.
Description: UI-only login placeholder wired to Sign in CTA.

Acceptance Criteria: /(auth)/signup renders branded UI; Get started CTA routes to it; no backend wired yet.
Description: UI-only signup placeholder wired to Get started CTA.

Acceptance Criteria: Pricing page with tier comparison + contact CTA; linked from nav; responsive.
Description: Pricing page with placeholder tier structure + contact CTA. Referenced by nav.

Acceptance Criteria: /account renders protected-route placeholder; ready for future auth gate.
Description: Protected-route placeholder for future authed product.

Acceptance Criteria: z-index tokens defined and applied to header/menu/overlays/cursor; no hardcoded 9999 values remain in those layers.
Description: Introduce z-index tokens; fix hardcoded stacking values and collisions.

Acceptance Criteria: Unused component removed; no imports break; build passes.
Description: Remove unused components/layout/PageShell.tsx.

Acceptance Criteria: Repeated inline styles on detail/marketing pages replaced by shared primitives; visual parity maintained.
Description: Replace 40-53 inline style blocks per page with shared layout primitives.

Acceptance Criteria: pnpm typecheck + build pass; every route has header/footer; no broken links/redirects; a11y smoke pass.
Description: Run typecheck + build; walk key routes to confirm chrome present everywhere and no broken links.

Acceptance Criteria: Real auth (provider chosen); Workspace persists server-side with export/import + versioning; data-loss risk eliminated.
Description: Authentication + Workspace backend persistence with export/import and versioning.

Acceptance Criteria: Pagination, sorting, pricing tiers, and a working purchase/cart flow implemented and tested.
Description: Pagination, sorting, pricing tiers, and functional purchase/cart flow.

Acceptance Criteria: Single search across bots, workflows, scenarios, knowledge replaces fragmented per-area search; relevant results + keyboard nav.
Description: Unified search across all entities; retire per-area search.

Acceptance Criteria: Synthetic metrics replaced with real usage data; dashboards reflect actual runs/failures.
Description: Replace synthetic sine-wave metrics with real usage telemetry.

Acceptance Criteria: All 14 accessibility modes implemented; font scaling works; contrast-safe focus ring; WCAG AA verified.
Description: Implement all 14 accessibility modes, font scaling, contrast-safe focus ring (currently 5 of 14).

Acceptance Criteria: Cursor/shader/scroll-reveal timings driven by motion tokens; no hardcoded durations; reduced-motion honored.
Description: Move hardcoded cursor/shader/scroll-reveal timings into motion tokens.

Acceptance Criteria: Blog + case-studies hub live with CMS-ready structure; per-route OG images; indexed in sitemap.
Description: Blog and case-studies hub for SEO/credibility; full per-route OG image set.
